input.query:
fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance 
| filter matchesValue(tags, "[Kubernetes]namespace:staging-astroshop")
| fields id, entity.type
| append [fetch dt.entity.service
| filter matchesValue(tags, "[Kubernetes]namespace:staging-astroshop")
| fields id, entity.type  ]
| append [fetch dt.entity.host 
| fields id, entity.type  ]
| append [fetch dt.entity.kubernetes_service
| filter matchesPhrase(namespaceName,"staging-astroshop")
| fields id, entity.type  ]
| append [fetch dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster
| fields id, entity.type  ]
| append [fetch dt.entity.kubernetes_node
| fields id, entity.type  ]
| append [fetch dt.entity.kubernetes_service
| filter matchesPhrase(entity.name,"nginx")
| fields id, entity.type  ]
| append [fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance 
| filter matchesPhrase(entity.name,"nginx")
| fields id, entity.type  ]
| append [fetch dt.entity.application
| filter matchesPhrase(entity.name,"staging") and contains(lower(entity.name),"astroshop")
| fields id, entity.type  ]
| append [fetch dt.entity.synthetic_test
| filter contains(lower(entity.name), "astroshop")
| fields id, entity.type  ]
